summary: Test assertion failure in pnpm config get test. The test expects a registry URL without trailing slash but receives one with a trailing slash.
root_cause: Test assertion mismatch: pnpm config get is returning registry URL with trailing slash ("https://my-org.registry.example.com/") but test expects URL without trailing slash ("https://my-org.registry.example.com")
relevant_tests: test/config/get.ts: pnpm config get reads npm options but ignores other settings from .npmrc

evidence.reason: Shows the test's expected output without trailing slash
Shows the actual output includes a trailing slash that the test does not expect
Test assertion at line 32 explicitly checks for registry URL without trailing slash
Only one test suite failed out of 65 total, indicating this is an isolated assertion failure

suggested_fix: Either update the test to accept the trailing slash (toBe('https://my-org.registry.example.com/')) or fix the config reading logic to strip the trailing slash when returning registry URLs
